payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown wooden side table with a single top drawer (round knob), paneled cabinet door below and decorative molding; small rectangular top holds books and a figurine, right side of the piece is cropped at the image edge and the finish appears polished — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).
attributes: single top drawer with round knob
